title: Scheduler Appointment
description: Defines the structure of an appointment in the scheduler component.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Interface defining the structure of a scheduler appointment.

props.name: endDate
props.description: End date and time of the appointment.

props.name: title
props.description: Title or name of the appointment.

props.name: startDate
props.description: Start date and time of the appointment.

props.name: resourceId
props.description: Optional resource identifier for timeline views.

props.name: allDay
props.description: Whether the appointment spans the entire day.

props.name: cssClass
props.description: Custom CSS class for styling the appointment.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the appointment is read-only and cannot be modified.

props.name: description
props.description: Additional description or notes for the appointment.

props.name: priority
props.description: Priority level of the appointment, used for visual styling.
